name: Wolkenkraft LIVE
summary: A large desktop-grade convection portable with deep temperature range and programmable stages, for committed daily patients.
description: The Wolkenkraft LIVE is the brand's most capable portable, using a patented convection system and a Coolscreen ceramic cooling module to deliver smooth, evenly heated vapour. The temperature range is unusually wide at 40 to 220C, controlled on a 1.3-inch RGB display with four-button operation and no app required. A sequence mode lets you program up to three heat stages, and a stealth mode dims the display with vibration alerts. The 3000mAh battery, titanium chamber and zirconium ceramic mouthpiece make it a serious tool, though at 311g it is large and the price is high. Worth it for patients who medicate heavily and want full session control; five-year warranty.

specs.label: Material
specs.value: Anodized Aluminium Body, Zirconium Ceramic Mouthpiece
